title: 2026 Lucid Gravity Touring review: A strong act 2
summary: Lucid also builds a more expensive Grand Touring version, starting at over $100,000. The Touring’s driving range of 337 miles (542 km) increases to 450 miles (742 km) in the Grand Touring, too.
